elements.text: Is Open Data Equal to Free Data?
This question can be interpreted in a number of ways are open data free to use, are they free to acquire and is there a cost to their proper management?

Data acquired through open licences are generally free to use but the openness of the licence could be one of several, whether they are Creative Commons or using another brand of license. 
Using Creative Commons as an example, CC-0 and CC-BY are clearly very open and free. However, going further through the spectrum of CC licences to CC-BY-SA you would be restricted to making sure that any derivatives produced from the original have the same licence, while those with NC cannot be used for commercial purposes.
